# HostNibo

> HostNibo provides premium web hosting solutions with exceptional performance, reliability, and 24/7 support.

## About

HostNibo is a web hosting company offering shared hosting, VPS, dedicated servers, domain registration, and SSL certificates. We serve customers with BDIX-powered servers for top-notch performance in Bangladesh.

## Key Pages

- [Home](/index.php) - Main landing page with hosting plans and features
- [Hosting Plans](/category/) - Browse all hosting categories and plans
- [Special Offers](/offers.php) - Current deals and promotions
- [Blog](/blogs.php) - Hosting tips, tutorials, and news
- [Contact Us](/contact.php) - Get in touch with our support team

## Services

- Shared Hosting with cPanel
- VPS Hosting
- Dedicated Servers
- Domain Registration (.com, .online, .xyz, and more)
- Free SSL Certificates
- 24/7 Professional Support

## API

- Domain Search: Use the domain search form on the homepage to check domain availability
- Newsletter Subscribe: Subscribe to our newsletter for updates
- Contact Form: Send us a message through the contact page

## Links

- Client Area: https://my.hostnibo.com
- Knowledge Base: https://my.hostnibo.com/knowledgebase
